column4: Behaviour Description

column2: Refers to the person level of understanding and mastery of the skills necessary for the position.
column4:
Basic Knowledge

• Has incomplete understanding on the matter

Limited Experience

• Understands terminology, concepts, principles and issues

Practical Application

• Understands and discusses application and implication of changes to processes, policies and procedures
• Knows patterns and best practices superficially

Applied Theory

• Provides practical ideas and perspectives on processes or improvements
• Translates complex nuances into easy to understand terms
• Understand and apply common patterns and best practices

Recognized Authority

• Consistently apply knowledge with excellence, coherence and solid arguments
• Understand, create and apply advanced patterns and best practices

column2: Refers to the effect that the person has on their environment considering their strength and reach.
column4:
Lone Worker

• Only infers on own decisions

Single Team Contribuitor

• Contributes to project decisions using full reference and resource materials

Multiple Team Contributor & Influencer

• Contributes and advices multiple teams for a given client

Leader

• Recognized "person to ask" on a given topic in its area
• Provides advice to multiple projects for different clients
• Adapts style and approaches others to maximize impact

General Leader

• Dictates where technology will go inside and/or outside the organization
• Give consultancy to clients, areas, and teams inside or outside the organization

column2: Refers to the attitude and actions carried out towards their own development and that for the community that the person shows
column4:
Proactive Learner.

• Approaches tasks mechanistically without deep research
• Uncapable of provide guide to others
• Self-centered

Active Worker

• Expected to need help on its tasks
• Actively research to increase understanding
• Capable of provide point of view to current team
• Recognizes those who helped it directly

Mentor

• Assist on reference and resource material creation
• Constantly expand it's knowledge with courses, books, or any other material
• Capable of mentoring others with his own experience
• Recognizes inmediate collaborators publicly

Coach

• Go to person inside the organization
• Assists on reference and resource material creation
• Capable of coaching others with experience and professional training
• Recognizes foreign teams and persons publicly

Expert Consultant

• Go to person inside and outside the organization
• Create or Lead reference and resource material creation
• Gives consultancy to clients, groups, or other organizations
• Recognizes efforts and achievements of different groups publicly

column2: Refers to the effective fulfillment of the key objectives of the person's role.
column4:
Rarely meets any goal

• Needs supervision to complete tasks
• They should be put on a performance improvement plan or leave soon.

Meets some perfomance goals

• Requires minimal guide to perform successfully
• This employee is not performing below expectations, but also not living up to their potential

Constantly meets ALL goals

• Performs without assistance 
• This employee is a great performer who’s growing and contributing. There are no material job gaps.

Meets ALL goals and may exceeds some

• Performs successfully and helps others to improve their performance
• This employee is special and their contribution is significant for their role.

Meets and Far Exceeds all goals in quantity, quality and time

• Outperforms successfully, guide others to improve performance, and proactively offers betterment of processes 
• They are absolutely remarkable in all ways
